reason: Go quality bar: function/file size budgets, one-source-of-truth, mutation-tested wiring seams — favicon digest + version threading must follow these.
favicon route + HTML templating error paths (missing embed, read failure) must be wrapped/handled per house style, not silently swallowed.
Rasterization recipe + exact tokens behind the committed favicon.png (sha256[:12]=61f833fd0705).
